name: Day Trading — MNQ & MGC
description: Optional-pack Prometheus playbook for professional intraday MNQ and MGC futures prep, chart/news/levels analysis, NY open planning, risk framing, execution discipline, trade journaling, and emotional guardrails. Use only when explicitly relevant to trading.

resources.description: Five-minute NY open prep workflow for urgent MNQ/MGC chart + news + levels requests.
Observed Sunday Nasdaq/NQ weekly prep workflow: web-search current futures, key levels, catalysts, and scenario-based bias without overclaiming live precision.
